description: CompositionWhite embroidered kurta made of 100% cotton, has a square neck, short sleeves, chest button placket, sequin on the front and sleeve, straps on the front with pom poms on the ends and an asymmetric hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironDesigned to celebrate femininity, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that are sure to make it a special wardrobe. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the contrast panels at the cuffs add zing to the garment. Team it with leggings or pyjamas, chunky accessories and heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
